summary: Integrations Page Video Provider Tests - All 15 backend tests PASSED, all frontend UI elements verified. New features working: Two sections (CALENDRIERS, VISIOCONFÉRENCE), Google Calendar with Meet badge, Zoom/Teams cards with connect/disconnect, feature badges, Google Meet note tied to Calendar.
passed_tests: GET /api/video-evidence/provider-status — Returns meet, zoom, teams with correct structure ✓
GET /api/video-evidence/provider-status — Meet connected via Google Calendar (igaal.hanouna@gmail.com) ✓
GET /api/video-evidence/provider-status — Zoom disconnected initially ✓
GET /api/video-evidence/provider-status — Teams disconnected initially ✓
POST /api/video-evidence/connect/zoom — Saves zoom_email and sets zoom_connected=true ✓
POST /api/video-evidence/connect/zoom — Works without email ✓
DELETE /api/video-evidence/connect/zoom — Removes zoom configuration ✓
POST /api/video-evidence/connect/teams — Saves azure_user_id and teams_email ✓
POST /api/video-evidence/connect/teams — Works with Azure ID only ✓
DELETE /api/video-evidence/connect/teams — Removes teams configuration ✓
Provider-status shows zoom connected=true with email after connect ✓
Provider-status shows teams connected=true with email after connect ✓
Provider-status shows zoom connected=false after disconnect ✓
Google Calendar connection still works (no regression) ✓
Outlook connection status preserved ✓
Frontend: CALENDRIERS section visible with Calendar icon ✓
Frontend: VISIOCONFÉRENCE section visible with Monitor icon ✓
Frontend: Google Calendar card shows 'Google Meet' badge with checkmark when connected ✓
Frontend: Google Calendar card shows 'Création de liens Google Meet activée via cette connexion' ✓
Frontend: Outlook card shows 'Calendrier' badge only (no Meet badge) ✓
Frontend: Zoom card shows 'Création de réunion' and 'Présences auto' feature badges ✓
Frontend: Teams card shows 'Création de réunion' and 'Présences auto' feature badges ✓
Frontend: Zoom connect flow works (form appears, email input, save) ✓
Frontend: Teams connect flow works (Azure ID input, email input, save) ✓
Frontend: Zoom card shows connected status with email (test@zoom.com) ✓
Frontend: Teams card shows connected status with email (user@company.com) ✓
Frontend: Zoom disconnect flow works ✓
Frontend: Teams disconnect flow works ✓
Frontend: Google Meet note at bottom of visio section explains Meet is tied to Google Calendar ✓
Frontend: Auto-sync section visible and functional ✓
critical_code_review_comments: Integrations.js correctly implements two sections (CALENDRIERS, VISIOCONFÉRENCE) with proper data-testid attributes
video_evidence_routes.py correctly implements provider-status with per-user connection info from user_settings
Connect/disconnect endpoints correctly update user_settings collection with timestamps
Google Meet badge correctly shows checkmark when Google Calendar is connected
Feature badges (Création de réunion, Présences auto) correctly displayed for Zoom/Teams
Google Meet note correctly explains it's tied to Google Calendar connection
seed_data_creation: Used existing test user with Google Calendar connected (igaal.hanouna@gmail.com). Zoom and Teams connections created/removed during testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Integrations page fully tested. Key points: 1) Two sections: CALENDRIERS (Google Calendar with Meet badge, Outlook) and VISIOCONFÉRENCE (Zoom, Teams), 2) Google Meet is tied to Google Calendar connection (no separate card), 3) Zoom/Teams have dedicated cards with connect/disconnect flows, 4) Feature badges show capabilities (Création de réunion, Présences auto), 5) Auto-sync section visible when calendar connected. All data-testid attributes working correctly.
